{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager",
  "description": "EHA Clinics, a subsidiary of eHealth Africa, is a health care network operating across Nigeria that provides high-quality, innovative, data-driven, and technology-enabled services. EHA Clinics delivers a comprehensive range of state of the art health care services in each location, e.g,&nbsp; general consultations, laboratory investigations, pharmaceuticals, annual medical checks, child wellness checks, ultrasonography, and specialized services (urgent care, telemedicine, home care, dental care, and ophthalmology).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager

Job Location: Kano
Job Type: Full time

Mission Objective


	The REACH program is dedicated to closing healthcare gaps by bringing quality and affordable services directly to communities.&nbsp;
	The REACH Practice and Quality Assurance Coordinator is responsible for coordinating and overseeing daily administrative activities of the clinic to ensure compassionate, effective, and efficient delivery of high-quality care for patients. S/he is responsible for the supervision of all employed support staff.
	S/he is responsible to ensure the overall smooth day-to-day operations, and employee engagement.
	S/He is additionally responsible for assisting the REACH Program Manager to achieve departmental and organisational goals.


Duties and Responsibilities&nbsp; &nbsp;
Purpose:


	Provide expert, strategic advice, guidance and support to the REACH management team and other key stakeholders to ensure the design, development and implementation of high-quality, innovative partnership and relationship management strategies, systems, and processes.
	Contribute to specialised projects and undertake research to identify new and prospective partners across both the government and non-government sectors which maximise opportunities for shared value.


Engagement:


	Develop, build and maintain strong working relationships with key internal and external stakeholders through effective communication, negotiation, and issues management to foster collaboration, leverage expertise and maximise partnership opportunities.
	Provide specialist expertise and advice in team management, business, activity and performance planning and reporting to align partnership resources with key strategic objectives and priorities effectively.
	Manage the negotiation, development, and implementation of all relevant partnership agreements and documentation including Memoranda of Understanding (MOUs) and Service Level Agreements (SLAs), to ensure compliance with legislative, departmental and project requirements and to support the development of enduring and mutually beneficial partnerships.
	Organise community health events to promote our services and memberships.


Delivery:


	Identify, anticipate, and respond to current and future issues and priorities, and devise and recommend appropriate solutions to complex problems and issues, to mitigate risks and support continuous improvement across all partnership activities.
	Supervise hiring, supervision, and training of full-time and ad-hoc staff


Targeted Specialized Knowledge&nbsp;


	University Degree in the Social Sciences, Statistics, Business Administration, Economics, Public Health or another relevant field; a Master&rsquo;s degree is an advantage
	Minimum of 5 years of work experience with demonstrated results in project, program and / or portfolio management.
	Minimum 2 year of work experience with demonstrated results in data collection, data analysis, data visualization, survey design, statistics and / or field-level M&amp;E or quality assurance
	Advanced computer skills, particularly in Excel / Google Sheets, database and statistical applications
	Strong technical writing skills, including management and / or programmatic reports, project proposals, scientific manuscripts, SOPs and / or manuals;&nbsp;
	Demonstrated research and presentation skills; at least one presentation given at an external event (conference, panel, etc.);
	Experience designing and delivering training / workshops;&nbsp;
	Excellent interpersonal, communication, critical thinking, problem-solving, team working and team building skills; excellent organizational and time management skills.


Remuneration
N780,000 monthly gross.&nbsp;

Benefits&nbsp;


	Health Coverage Benefit&nbsp;
	Performance Bonus
	13th Month
	Annual Skills Assessment.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-29",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-30",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Project Manager Job at EHA Clinics




        
    

        
        EHA Clinics, a subsidiary of eHealth Africa, is a health care network operating across Nigeria that provides high-quality, innovative, data-driven, and technology-enabled services. EHA Clinics delivers a comprehensive range of state of the art health care services in each location, e.g,  general consultations, laboratory investigations, pharmaceuticals, annual medical checks, child wellness checks, ultrasonography, and specialized services (urgent care, telemedicine, home care, dental care, and ophthalmology).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager

Job Location: Kano
Job Type: Full time

Mission Objective
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The REACH program is dedicated to closing healthcare gaps by bringing quality and affordable services directly to communities. 
	The REACH Practice and Quality Assurance Coordinator is responsible for coordinating and overseeing daily administrative activities of the clinic to ensure compassionate, effective, and efficient delivery of high-quality care for patients. S/he is responsible for the supervision of all employed support staff.
	S/he is responsible to ensure the overall smooth day-to-day operations, and employee engagement.
	S/He is additionally responsible for assisting the REACH Program Manager to achieve departmental and organisational goals.


Duties and Responsibilities   
Purpose:


	Provide expert, strategic advice, guidance and support to the REACH management team and other key stakeholders to ensure the design, development and implementation of high-quality, innovative partnership and relationship management strategies, systems, and processes.
	Contribute to specialised projects and undertake research to identify new and prospective partners across both the government and non-government sectors which maximise opportunities for shared value.


Engagement:


	Develop, build and maintain strong working relationships with key internal and external stakeholders through effective communication, negotiation, and issues management to foster collaboration, leverage expertise and maximise partnership opportunities.
	Provide specialist expertise and advice in team management, business, activity and performance planning and reporting to align partnership resources with key strategic objectives and priorities effectively.
	Manage the negotiation, development, and implementation of all relevant partnership agreements and documentation including Memoranda of Understanding (MOUs) and Service Level Agreements (SLAs), to ensure compliance with legislative, departmental and project requirements and to support the development of enduring and mutually beneficial partnerships.
	Organise community health events to promote our services and memberships.


Delivery:


	Identify, anticipate, and respond to current and future issues and priorities, and devise and recommend appropriate solutions to complex problems and issues, to mitigate risks and support continuous improvement across all partnership activities.
	Supervise hiring, supervision, and training of full-time and ad-hoc staff


Targeted Specialized Knowledge 


	University Degree in the Social Sciences, Statistics, Business Administration, Economics, Public Health or another relevant field; a Master’s degree is an advantage
	Minimum of 5 years of work experience with demonstrated results in project, program and / or portfolio management.
	Minimum 2 year of work experience with demonstrated results in data collection, data analysis, data visualization, survey design, statistics and / or field-level M&E or quality assurance
	Advanced computer skills, particularly in Excel / Google Sheets, database and statistical applications
	Strong technical writing skills, including management and / or programmatic reports, project proposals, scientific manuscripts, SOPs and / or manuals; 
	Demonstrated research and presentation skills; at least one presentation given at an external event (conference, panel, etc.);
	Experience designing and delivering training / workshops; 
	Excellent interpersonal, communication, critical thinking, problem-solving, team working and team building skills; excellent organizational and time management skills.


Remuneration
N780,000 monthly gross. 

Benefits 


	Health Coverage Benefit 
	Performance Bonus
	13th Month
	Annual Skills Assessment.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Structural Engineer",
  "description": "Ossaj Services is a leading technical service company dedicated to delivering innovative engineering design solutions. We support projects across various industries by providing reliable, efficient, and high?quality technical expertise tailored to meet our clients&rsquo; needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Structural Engineer

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Summary


	The Structural Engineer performs structural analysis and design for a variety of engineering projects. This role works with moderate supervision and contributes to the preparation of structural calculations, drawings, and design documentation.


Key Responsibilities


	Perform structural analysis and design calculations.
	Develop structural details and engineering drawings.
	Design support systems and structural components.
	Coordinate with architects, contractors, and other project stakeholders.
	Review construction drawings and field conditions.
	Assistwith construction support and technical problem solving.
	Prepare technical reports and engineering documentation.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil or Structural Engineering.
	3&ndash;5 years of structural engineering experience.
	Professional Engineer (PE) license preferred or in progress.
	Strong understanding of steel, concrete, and anchorage design.
	Proficiency with structural analysis software and drafting tools.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@ossajventures.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Structural Engineer Job at Ossaj Services




        
    

        
        Ossaj Services is a leading technical service company dedicated to delivering innovative engineering design solutions. We support projects across various industries by providing reliable, efficient, and high?quality technical expertise tailored to meet our clients’ needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Structural Engineer

Job Location: Iyana Ipaja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Position Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Structural Engineer performs structural analysis and design for a variety of engineering projects. This role works with moderate supervision and contributes to the preparation of structural calculations, drawings, and design documentation.


Key Responsibilities


	Perform structural analysis and design calculations.
	Develop structural details and engineering drawings.
	Design support systems and structural components.
	Coordinate with architects, contractors, and other project stakeholders.
	Review construction drawings and field conditions.
	Assistwith construction support and technical problem solving.
	Prepare technical reports and engineering documentation.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil or Structural Engineering.
	3–5 years of structural engineering experience.
	Professional Engineer (PE) license preferred or in progress.
	Strong understanding of steel, concrete, and anchorage design.
	Proficiency with structural analysis software and drafting tools.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Basic Technology Teacher Job at Rainbow Educational Service Limited




        
    

        
        Rainbow Educational Service Limited is a leading Nigerian school offering a blended Nigerian and Cambridge curriculum is seeking exceptional talent. The organization is known for its global approach to education and commitment to nurturing well-rounded students within a high-quality learning environment, and is backed by a top-flight education management company in Nigeria

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Basic Technology Teacher

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A leading Nigerian school offering a blended Nigerian and Cambridge curriculum is seeking exceptional talent. The organization is known for its global approach to education and commitment to nurturing well rounded students within a high quality learning environment, and is backed by a top-flight education management company in Nigeria.


Key Responsibilities


	Teach Basic Technology concepts in line with the approved curriculum.
	Develop lesson plans that incorporate both theoretical and practical learning.
	Identify students’ learning gaps and adjust teaching methods accordingly.
	Engage students through hands-on activities and demonstrations.
	Prepare students for WAEC examinations and internal assessments.


Requirements


	Degree in Technical Education, Engineering, or a related discipline.
	Relevant teaching certification may be required.
	Strong practical and technical teaching skills.
	Good classroom management and organizational abilities.
	TRCN certification.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Addoz Integrated Resources - Our client in the Clothing &amp; Thrift Fashion industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Mandilas, Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Sector: Sales &amp; Marketing

Job Summary


	They are currently seeking to hire a creative, smart, and results-driven Digital Marketer to drive online visibility, customer engagement, and sales growth across digital platforms.
	The ideal candidate must be passionate about digital marketing, possess strong communication and content creation skills, and have a solid understanding of online marketing strategies within the fashion, retail, or thrift industry.
	Candidates applying for this role must have at least 2 years of relevant experience in digital marketing.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness and sales
	Manage and grow the company&rsquo;s social media platforms and online presence
	Create engaging content for social media, promotions, and online campaigns
	Run and monitor paid advertisements across digital platforms
	Promote the company&rsquo;s clothing and thrift products through online marketing channels
	Engage with customers online and respond to inquiries professionally
	Track campaign performance and prepare periodic marketing reports
	Conduct market research and monitor competitors&rsquo; online activities
	Work closely with the sales team to improve customer engagement and conversion
	Support business growth through innovative digital marketing initiatives


Requirements


	OND, HND, or B.Sc qualification
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience in Digital Marketing or a related role
	Experience in clothing, fashion, or thrift business is an added advantage
	Good knowledge of social media marketing and online advertising
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet targets
	Creative, confident, and result-oriented personality
	Knowledge of content creation and basic design tools is an added advantage.


Salary
N200,000 &ndash; N250,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: addozrecruitment@gmail.com using &ldquo;Digital Marketer &ndash; Mandilas&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

Digital Marketer Job at Addoz Integrated Resources




        
    

        
        Addoz Integrated Resources - Our client in the Clothing & Thrift Fashion industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Mandilas, Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Sector: Sales & Marketing

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	They are currently seeking to hire a creative, smart, and results-driven Digital Marketer to drive online visibility, customer engagement, and sales growth across digital platforms.
	The ideal candidate must be passionate about digital marketing, possess strong communication and content creation skills, and have a solid understanding of online marketing strategies within the fashion, retail, or thrift industry.
	Candidates applying for this role must have at least 2 years of relevant experience in digital marketing.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement digital marketing strategies to increase brand awareness and sales
	Manage and grow the company’s social media platforms and online presence
	Create engaging content for social media, promotions, and online campaigns
	Run and monitor paid advertisements across digital platforms
	Promote the company’s clothing and thrift products through online marketing channels
	Engage with customers online and respond to inquiries professionally
	Track campaign performance and prepare periodic marketing reports
	Conduct market research and monitor competitors’ online activities
	Work closely with the sales team to improve customer engagement and conversion
	Support business growth through innovative digital marketing initiatives


Requirements


	OND, HND, or B.Sc qualification
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience in Digital Marketing or a related role
	Experience in clothing, fashion, or thrift business is an added advantage
	Good knowledge of social media marketing and online advertising
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet targets
	Creative, confident, and result-oriented personality
	Knowledge of content creation and basic design tools is an added advantage.


Salary
N200,000 – N250,000 Monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Digital Marketer – Mandilas” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
